common.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: CTech Wallet
login.subtitle: Your real balance for PIX and CTech services.

accessDenied.title: Sign-in was cancelled
accessDenied.description: You didn't grant access to CTech Wallet. No wallet activity was changed. Return to sign in when you're ready.

sessionExpired.title: Your sign-in session expired
sessionExpired.description: For your security, the sign-in attempt can no longer be used. Start again to create a fresh session.

unavailable.title: Sign-in is temporarily unavailable
unavailable.description: CTech Account couldn't complete this attempt. Wait a moment and try signing in again.

invalidRequest.title: This sign-in link can't be used
invalidRequest.description: The link is invalid or has already been used. Return to sign in to create a new one.

invalidCallback.title: This sign-in response is incomplete
invalidCallback.description: We couldn't verify the response from CTech Account. Return to sign in and start again.

generic.title: We couldn't complete sign-in
generic.description: No wallet activity was changed. Return to sign in and try again.

dashboard.loadError: We couldn't load your balances. Refresh the page to try again.

ledger.label: Wallet statements
ledger.error: We couldn't load the statement. Refresh the page to try again.
ledger.loadMoreError: We couldn't load older transactions. Try again.

empty.real: No real-balance transactions yet. Make a PIX deposit to get started.
empty.game: No game-balance transactions yet. Send money from your real balance when you want to use it in games.
empty.sandbox: No sandbox-credit transactions yet. Buy credits with your game balance when you want to use them.

game.label: Game balance
game.subtitle: Real money set aside for games. To withdraw it, return it to your real balance first — you can do that anytime, with no fee.

sandbox.label: Sandbox credits
sandbox.subtitle: Virtual currency for matches, bought with your game balance. It has no monetary value and can't be withdrawn or converted back.

balance.activateLink: Going to use the wallet for games? Activate the game wallet.

deposit.title: Deposit via PIX
deposit.description: We generate a PIX code for you to pay in your bank app.

withdraw.title: Withdraw to PIX
withdraw.description: The withdrawal fee is deducted from your balance along with the amount.
withdraw.pixDestination: The PIX will be sent to the CPF registered on your account. You must already have a PIX key registered for it at your bank.

credits.title: Buy sandbox credits
credits.description: Debited from your game balance. Sandbox credits never become money again.

fundGame.title: Send to the game wallet
fundGame.description: It stays your money: you can return it to your real balance whenever you want. Your game limits apply here.

returnGame.title: Return to real balance
returnGame.description: No fee and no limit — moving money out of the game wallet is always allowed.

error.overWithdrawable: Including the fee, the maximum available to withdraw is {{amount}}.

withdraw.title: Confirm withdrawal
withdraw.description: Review the amount and fee before the money leaves your balance.

fundGame.title: Confirm transfer to games
fundGame.description: This move counts toward your game limit. Returning money later does not free it up again.

returnGame.title: Confirm return to real balance
returnGame.description: No fee and no limit — money leaving the game wallet is always allowed.

stepUp.title: Identity check required
stepUp.description: For your security, withdrawals require a recent MFA check. Re-verify your identity to continue.

pix.title: Pay {{amount}} via PIX
pix.description: Copy the code and pay in your bank app. The balance updates as soon as the bank confirms the payment.
pix.expired: This PIX code has expired. Close this window and start a new deposit.

transactions.title: Transaction status
transactions.description: Updates are tied to the reference below and remain visible after a refresh.

guidance.processing: The debit is already reflected in your balance while the bank confirms the PIX. If it cannot be completed, the amount and fee are returned automatically. You can close this page safely.
guidance.refund_failed: The PIX was not completed and the automatic refund still needs reconciliation. Our team has been notified; keep the reference above if you contact support.

toast.withdrawProcessing: Withdrawal submitted and awaiting bank confirmation.
toast.withdrawReversed: Withdrawal could not be completed — the amount was refunded to your balance.
toast.withdrawRefundFailed: Withdrawal failed and the refund is pending. Our team has been notified.
toast.fundGameSent: Balance sent to the game wallet.

terms.title: Just one more step
terms.description: Before accessing your real balance and PIX activity, read and accept the CTech Wallet Additional Terms.
terms.error: We couldn't confirm. Please try again.
terms.checkboxPrefix: I have read and agree with the
terms.lookupErrorTitle: We couldn't verify your terms status
terms.lookupErrorDescription: For your protection, the wallet remains unavailable until we can confirm that you accepted the current Additional Terms. Your balances and money are unchanged.

gambling.title: Activate the game wallet
gambling.description: We create a separate wallet for games. The money in it stays yours and returns to your real balance whenever you want — no fee and no limit.
gambling.bullet1: It is the only door to games: you can't play directly from your real balance.
gambling.bullet2: Your limits apply when sending to the game wallet. Returning money does not free up limit again.
gambling.bullet3: Sandbox credits have no monetary value and never become money again.
gambling.checkboxPrefix: I have read and agree with the
gambling.limitsDescription: Choose how much you can send to games per day, week, and month.

error.kycNotVerified: Verify your identity in your CTech account before activating the game wallet.
error.termsRequired: Accept the responsible gaming terms to continue.
error.generic: We couldn't activate. Please try again.

responsible.title: Responsible gaming
responsible.description: Review and adjust your limits or take a break from real-money gaming.

limits.title: Game deposit limits
limits.description: They count every transfer from real balance to game balance. Returns do not restore headroom.
limits.coherence: Use values above zero, with daily no greater than weekly and weekly no greater than monthly.
limits.cooldown: Increases take effect in 7 days; monthly increases take effect in 14 days. Reductions are immediate.

exclusion.title: Self-exclusion
exclusion.description: Blocks new real-money deposits and play. You can still return your game balance and use sandbox credits.
exclusion.periodLabel: Choose how long to block real-money gaming
exclusion.confirm: Selected duration: {{period}}. Self-exclusion starts immediately and cannot end early. Type {{phrase}} to confirm.
exclusion.confirmationHint: Type {{phrase}}. Letter case does not matter.
exclusion.error: We couldn't activate self-exclusion. Your settings have not changed. Try again.
exclusion.until: Real-money deposits and play are blocked until {{date}}.
exclusion.indefinite: Real-money deposits and play are blocked indefinitely.
exclusion.helpDescription: These independent support services are available before or after you start self-exclusion.

errors.walletBusy: An operation is already in progress. Wait a few seconds.
errors.withdrawCpfMismatch: The PIX key belongs to a different CPF. Use a key under your name.
errors.pixKeyNotFound: PIX key not found. Check it and try again.
errors.kycNotVerified: Verify your identity in your account before continuing.
errors.stepUpRequired: Confirm your identity with MFA and try the withdrawal again.
errors.idempotencyConflict: This operation was already sent with different data. Reload the page.
errors.gamblingNotActivated: Activate the game wallet to use this operation.
errors.gamblingTermsRequired: Accept the responsible gaming terms to continue.
errors.depositOutOfRange: The deposit must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
errors.amountAboveLimit: The maximum amount per operation is {{max}}.
errors.selfExcluded: Your self-exclusion blocks deposits to the game wallet.
errors.limitsNotConfigured: Set your game limits before continuing.
errors.depositLimitExceeded: This transfer exceeds one of your game limits.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notFound.description: The page you are trying to access does not exist or was removed.

home.title: Your CTech balance
home.description: Check your money, deposit or withdraw via PIX, and follow every transaction.
